title: Constraint frontmatter schema
description: Schema for CON artifacts — constraints that limit solution options. Classified by type: business (budget, timeline, resource), regulatory (laws, standards, compliance), or technical (platform, compatibility, performance). Constraints live in 01-product/constraints/ because they represent external forces that shape the solution space before requirements elaboration begins. CON is a Core tier artifact — relevant to any project, not only compliance-driven ones.

status.description: draft: captured; proposed: reviewed; approved: accepted as binding; deprecated: no longer applicable. Compliance with constraints is verified through derived FR/NFR, not through the constraint's own lifecycle.

constraint_type.description: Classification of the constraint: business (budget, timeline, resource, organizational), regulatory (laws, standards, compliance mandates), or technical (platform, compatibility, performance bounds, technology choices)

parent_epic.description: Wiki link to the parent Epic

derives_from.description: Wiki links to parent BRQ or CTRL artifacts this constraint is derived from

depends_on.description: Wiki links to other requirements this constraint depends on

source_ref.description: Reference to a Source Document artifact in 01-product/sources/ (e.g., 'SRC-PCI-001#section-6'). Optional — not all CON originate from in-repo source documents.
